chunks.text: ?7 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 735 of 201,6 DATE IUDG oRD R E S WITH G I NATURE oF E Heains / For Heanng of Main Case 05.09.2018 Yt Yil Mul,taz Ali Bughio, Advocate for the peritioners. Mr. Naimatullah Bhurgri, State counsel. Learned counsel for the petitioners states that this petition may be disposed of directing the official respondents to ensure the supply of water for the purpose of irrigation of petitioners' lands as per their share. order accordingly. Constitution petition stands disposed of. T ge Ju I U
